reviews.comment:
yo soy socio del ACA pero este negocio que es muy caro nos brindan muy poco servicio y atención.. Los lugares están tomados por clientes comunes y no tenemos ningún lugar para los socios

(Translated by Google)
I'm an ACA member, but this very expensive business provides us with very little service and attention. The spaces are all taken up by regular customers, and there's nowhere for members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnMXVHb3FBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Para los que viajamos llegar a un lugar donde la atencion es muy buena, la comida muy rica y que los baños impecables es lo mejor que nos puede pasar! Hace años que pasamos por aquí y la atención y limpieza del lugar siempre destaca.

(Translated by Google)
For those of us who travel, arriving at a place where the service is excellent, the food is delicious, and the bathrooms are spotless is the best thing that can happen! We've been coming here for years, and the service and cleanliness of the place always stand out.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnMXJMdFd3EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Mandatory stop always
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnNjU2YXdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente, somos vegetarianos y es muy dificil comercrn la ruta. Comimos hamburgesa, ensalada, sandwich, pizza para 4 personas con bebida, todo muy bueno x $ 26.000. El lugar agradable, climatizado, atencion rapida.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent. We're vegetarians, and it's very difficult to eat on the route. We had a hamburger, salad, sandwich, and pizza for four with a drink, all very good for $26,000. The place was pleasant, air-conditioned, and service was quick.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnaU1XSDVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Toda la vida pare ahí, me sentía y me siento identificado ACA-YPF pero últimamente la atención es paupérrima, puede ser que el personal tenga algún conflicto, no lo se pero son de terror.

(Translated by Google)
I've always stopped there, I felt and still feel identified with ACA-YPF, but lately the service is terrible. Maybe the staff has some kind of conflict, I don't know, but they're awful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBZzRuRVVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención y variedad para comida te atienden rápido muy buenos baños 😉 súper limpios toda la.estacion.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and a wide variety of food options. They serve you quickly. Very nice bathrooms 😉 super clean throughout the entire station.

reviews.comment:
Quiero destacar la limpieza de los baños. Excepcional. Felicito a la señora a cargo , no hay vez que falle, siempre impecable. Denle un aumento !!

(Translated by Google)
I want to highlight the cleanliness of the restrooms. Exceptional. I congratulate the lady in charge; she never fails, always spotless. Give her a raise!
